mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TASK ( TASK_TITLE, TASK_CONTENT, PRIORITY, DUE_DATE, USER_ID, CATEGORY_ID ) VALUES ( #{taskTitle, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{taskContent, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{priority, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dueDate, jdbcType=DATE}, #{userId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{categoryId, jdbcType=NUMERIC} )
mapper.select: SELECT TASK_ID, TASK_TITLE, TASK_CONTENT, PRIORITY, DUE_DATE, USER_ID, CATEGORY_ID, STATUS, TASK_STATUS, CREATED_DATE, UPDATED_DATE FROM TASK WHERE TASK_ID = #{taskId} AND STATUS <> 'DELETED'
SELECT TASK_ID, TASK_TITLE, TASK_CONTENT, PRIORITY, DUE_DATE, USER_ID, CATEGORY_ID, STATUS, TASK_STATUS, CREATED_DATE, UPDATED_DATE FROM TASK WHERE STATUS <> 'DELETED' ORDER BY TASK_ID DESC

SELECT TASK_ID, TASK_TITLE, TASK_CONTENT, PRIORITY, DUE_DATE, USER_ID, CATEGORY_ID, STATUS, TASK_STATUS, CREATED_DATE, UPDATED_DATE FROM TASK WHERE STATUS = #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY TASK_ID DESC

SELECT TASK_ID, TASK_TITLE, TASK_CONTENT, PRIORITY, DUE_DATE, USER_ID, CATEGORY_ID, STATUS, TASK_STATUS, CREATED_DATE, UPDATED_DATE FROM TASK WHERE STATUS <> 'DELETED' AND TASK_STATUS = #{taskStatus, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY TASK_ID DESC

SELECT TASK_ID, TASK_TITLE, TASK_CONTENT, PRIORITY, DUE_DATE, USER_ID, CATEGORY_ID, STATUS, TASK_STATUS, CREATED_DATE, UPDATED_DATE FROM TASK WHERE STATUS <> 'DELETED' AND USER_ID = #{userId} AND TASK_STATUS <> 'DONE' AND DUE_DATE IS NOT NULL AND TRUNC(DUE_DATE) = TRUNC(SYSDATE) ORDER BY DUE_DATE ASC, TASK_ID DESC

SELECT TASK_ID, TASK_TITLE, TASK_CONTENT, PRIORITY, DUE_DATE, USER_ID, CATEGORY_ID, STATUS, TASK_STATUS, CREATED_DATE, UPDATED_DATE FROM TASK WHERE STATUS <> 'DELETED' AND USER_ID = #{userId} AND TASK_STATUS <> 'DONE' AND DUE_DATE IS NOT NULL AND TRUNC(DUE_DATE) < TRUNC(SYSDATE) ORDER BY DUE_DATE ASC, TASK_ID DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE TASK SET TASK_TITLE = #{taskTitle, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TASK_CONTENT = #{taskContent, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PRIORITY = #{priority, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DUE_DATE = #{dueDate, jdbcType=DATE}, USER_ID = #{userId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CATEGORY_ID = #{categoryId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, TASK_STATUS = #{taskStatus, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATED_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE TASK_ID = #{taskId} AND STATUS <> 'DELETED'
UPDATE TASK SET TASK_STATUS = #{taskStatus, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATED_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE TASK_ID = #{taskId} AND STATUS <> 'DELETED'
UPDATE TASK SET STATUS = 'DELETED', UPDATED_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE TASK_ID = #{taskId} AND STATUS <> 'DELETED'
